questions.question: Describe the key differences between agile and traditional project management methodologies. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the main principles and approaches of each methodology

questions.question: Explain the concept of risk management in software engineering and its importance in project planning. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide examples of risk types and their impact on projects

questions.question: An organization is planning to develop a new software application. The development team estimates that it will take 20 weeks to complete the project. If the project manager decides to use the $50/hour rate for the team, what is the estimated total cost of the project? (15 marks)
questions.hint: Use the given rate to calculate the total cost
